name: Twilio
description: Monitor Twilio account configuration and communication resources for compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to https://console.twilio.com — copy your Account SID and Auth Token
2. Encode credentials: base64('AccountSID:AuthToken')
3. Enter both the encoded value and raw Account SID below

credentialFields.label: Encoded Credentials
credentialFields.helpText: Base64 encode your Account SID and Auth Token: base64('AccountSID:AuthToken'). Use https://www.base64encode.org/

credentialFields.label: Account SID
credentialFields.helpText: Your Twilio Account SID from the console dashboard

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Twilio account is active and properly configured

checks.name: Contact Information
checks.description: Lists Twilio phone numbers for communication infrastructure inventory
